SELECT B365D
FROM football_data
WHERE Season = '2016/2017'
  AND HomeTeam = 'Swindon'
  AND AwayTeam = 'Millwall';

SELECT B365D
FROM football_data
WHERE Season IN ('2016/2017','2016-2017')
  AND ((HomeTeam = 'Swindon' AND AwayTeam = 'Millwall')
    OR (HomeTeam = 'Millwall' AND AwayTeam = 'Swindon'))
ORDER BY Datetime DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT Datetime, HomeTeam, AwayTeam, B365D
FROM football_data
WHERE Season = '2016/2017'
  AND HomeTeam LIKE 'Swindon%'
  AND AwayTeam LIKE 'Millwall%';

SELECT B365D AS bet365_draw_odds
FROM football_data
WHERE Season = '2016/2017'
  AND (HomeTeam || ' v ' || AwayTeam = 'Swindon v Millwall'
       OR HomeTeam || ' vs ' || AwayTeam = 'Swindon vs Millwall'
       OR HomeTeam || ' v.s. ' || AwayTeam = 'Swindon v.s. Millwall');

SELECT AVG(B365D) AS avg_bet365_draw_odds
FROM football_data
WHERE Season = '2016/2017'
  AND ((HomeTeam = 'Swindon' AND AwayTeam = 'Millwall')
    OR (HomeTeam = 'Millwall' AND AwayTeam = 'Swindon'));
SELECT B365D FROM football_data WHERE HomeTeam = "Swindon" and AwayTeam = "Millwall" and Season = "2016/2017"

SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM football_data
  WHERE Country NOT IN ('Scotland','England')
    AND Referee IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(Referee) <> ''
) THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS has_other_leagues_referees;

SELECT Country, League, COUNT(DISTINCT Referee) AS referee_count
FROM football_data
WHERE Country NOT IN ('Scotland','England')
  AND Referee IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM(Referee) <> ''
GROUP BY Country, League
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Referee) > 0
ORDER BY referee_count DESC;

SELECT DISTINCT League

SELECT DISTINCT Country

SELECT count(League) FROM football_data WHERE Country != "Scotland" and Country != "England" and Referee != ""

SELECT Season, Datetime, HomeTeam, AwayTeam, PSH AS Pinnacle_Arsenal_Win_Odds
FROM football_data
WHERE HomeTeam = 'Arsenal' AND PSH IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT Season, Datetime, HomeTeam, AwayTeam, PSA AS Pinnacle_Arsenal_Win_Odds
FROM football_data
WHERE AwayTeam = 'Arsenal' AND PSA IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY Datetime;

SELECT Season, Datetime, HomeTeam, AwayTeam,
       CASE WHEN HomeTeam = 'Arsenal' THEN PSH
            WHEN AwayTeam = 'Arsenal' THEN PSA
       END AS Pinnacle_Arsenal_Win_Odds
FROM football_data
WHERE (HomeTeam = 'Arsenal' OR AwayTeam = 'Arsenal')
  AND (CASE WHEN HomeTeam = 'Arsenal' THEN PSH ELSE PSA END) IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY Datetime;

SELECT Season, Datetime, HomeTeam, AwayTeam,
       CASE WHEN HomeTeam = 'Arsenal' THEN PSH ELSE PSA END AS Pinnacle_Arsenal_Win_Odds
FROM football_data
WHERE (HomeTeam = 'Arsenal' AND FTR = 'H')
   OR (AwayTeam = 'Arsenal' AND FTR = 'A')

SELECT Type,
       (COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE Outcome = 'Investigation complete')) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) AS investigation_complete_rate
FROM GreaterManchesterCrime

LIMIT 1;

WITH complete AS (
  SELECT Type, COUNT(*) AS complete_cnt
  FROM GreaterManchesterCrime
  WHERE Outcome = 'Investigation complete'
  GROUP BY Type
), totals AS (
  SELECT Type, COUNT(*) AS total_cnt
  FROM GreaterManchesterCrime
  GROUP BY Type
)
SELECT t.Type,
       1.0 * COALESCE(c.complete_cnt, 0) / t.total_cnt AS investigation_complete_rate
FROM totals t
LEFT JOIN complete c ON c.Type = t.Type
ORDER BY investigation_complete_rate DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH extremes AS (
  SELECT MAX(totalSnatched) AS max_snatched,
         MIN(totalSnatched) AS min_snatched
  FROM torrents
  WHERE LOWER(artist) = LOWER('lasean camry')
)
SELECT CASE
         WHEN t.totalSnatched = e.max_snatched THEN 'most popular'
         WHEN t.totalSnatched = e.min_snatched THEN 'least popular'
       END AS which,
       t.groupName,
       t.totalSnatched
FROM torrents t
CROSS JOIN extremes e
WHERE LOWER(t.artist) = LOWER('lasean camry')
  AND (t.totalSnatched = e.max_snatched OR t.totalSnatched = e.min_snatched);

      WHEN LATITUDE >= 30 AND LATITUDE < 35 THEN '30-35'
      WHEN LATITUDE >= 35 AND LATITUDE < 40 THEN '35-40'
      WHEN LATITUDE >= 40 AND LATITUDE < 45 THEN '40-45'
      WHEN LATITUDE >= 45 AND LATITUDE < 50 THEN '45-50'
      ELSE '50+'
    END AS lat_band
  FROM Fires
  WHERE LATITUDE IS NOT NULL
)

ORDER BY fire_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT land_type, COUNT(*) AS wildfire_count
FROM (
  SELECT CASE
    WHEN OWNER_DESCR IS NULL THEN 'unknown'
    WHEN LOWER(OWNER_DESCR) LIKE '%private%' OR LOWER(OWNER_DESCR) LIKE '%individual%' OR LOWER(OWNER_DESCR) LIKE '%corporat%' THEN 'private'
    WHEN LOWER(OWNER_DESCR) LIKE '%usfs%' OR LOWER(OWNER_DESCR) LIKE '%forest service%' OR LOWER(OWNER_DESCR) LIKE '%blm%' OR LOWER(OWNER_DESCR) LIKE '%bureau of land management%'
      OR LOWER(OWNER_DESCR) LIKE '%nps%' OR LOWER(OWNER_DESCR) LIKE '%national park%' OR LOWER(OWNER_DESCR) LIKE '%federal%'
      OR LOWER(OWNER_DESCR) LIKE '%state%' OR LOWER(OWNER_DESCR) LIKE '%county%' OR LOWER(OWNER_DESCR) LIKE '%city%'
      OR LOWER(OWNER_DESCR) LIKE '%tribal%' OR LOWER(OWNER_DESCR) LIKE '%reservation%'
      THEN 'public'
    ELSE 'unknown'
  END AS land_type
  FROM Fires
) t
WHERE land_type IN ('public','private')
GROUP BY land_type
ORDER BY wildfire_count DESC;

    ELSE 'public'
  END AS land_type
  FROM Fires
)

  FROM Fires

         WHEN hr BETWEEN 5 AND 11 THEN 'Morning'

LIMIT 1;

WITH per_sample AS (
  SELECT s.sample_pk,
         s.variety,
         SUM(r.concen) AS total_residue
  FROM sampledata15 s
  JOIN resultsdata15 r ON r.sample_pk = s.sample_pk
  WHERE s.commod = 'APPLE'
    AND s.variety IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY s.sample_pk, s.variety
)

       AVG(total_residue) AS avg_total_residue_per_sample
FROM per_sample
GROUP BY variety
ORDER BY avg_total_residue_per_sample DESC;

WITH per_sample AS (
  SELECT s.sample_pk,
         s.variety,
         SUM(CASE WHEN r.concen > 0 THEN r.concen ELSE 0 END) AS total_detected_residue
  FROM sampledata15 s
  JOIN resultsdata15 r ON r.sample_pk = s.sample_pk
  WHERE s.commod = 'APPLE'
    AND s.variety IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY s.sample_pk, s.variety
)
SELECT variety,
       PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY total_detected_residue) AS median_detected_residue
FROM per_sample

WITH inducted_players AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT player_id
  FROM hall_of_fame
  WHERE inducted = 'Y'
), month_stats AS (
  SELECT p.birth_month AS birth_month,
         COUNT(*) AS total_players,
         SUM(CASE WHEN ip.player_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS inducted_players
  FROM player p
  LEFT JOIN inducted_players ip
    ON ip.player_id = p.player_id
  WHERE p.birth_month IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY p.birth_month
)
SELECT birth_month,
       inducted_players * 1.0 / NULLIF(total_players, 0) AS induction_rate
FROM month_stats
ORDER BY induction_rate DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH hof_one_row_per_player AS (
  SELECT player_id,
         MAX(CASE WHEN inducted = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS inducted_flag
  FROM hall_of_fame
  GROUP BY player_id
), month_stats AS (
  SELECT p.birth_month,
         COUNT(*) AS total_players,
         SUM(COALESCE(h.inducted_flag, 0)) AS inducted_players
  FROM player p
  LEFT JOIN hof_one_row_per_player h
    ON h.player_id = p.player_id
  WHERE p.birth_month IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY p.birth_month
)
SELECT birth_month,
       inducted_players * 1.0 / NULLIF(total_players, 0) AS likelihood
FROM month_stats
ORDER BY likelihood DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH hof_candidates AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT player_id
  FROM hall_of_fame
), inducted_players AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT player_id
  FROM hall_of_fame
  WHERE inducted = 'Y'
), month_stats AS (
  SELECT p.birth_month,
         COUNT(*) AS total_candidates,
         SUM(CASE WHEN ip.player_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS inducted_candidates
  FROM player p
  JOIN hof_candidates c
    ON c.player_id = p.player_id
  LEFT JOIN inducted_players ip
    ON ip.player_id = p.player_id
  WHERE p.birth_month IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY p.birth_month
)
SELECT birth_month,
       inducted_candidates * 1.0 / NULLIF(total_candidates, 0) AS induction_rate_among_candidates
FROM month_stats
ORDER BY induction_rate_among_candidates DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH ages AS (
  SELECT pa.award_id,
         pa.player_id,
         p.name_first,
         p.name_last,
         pa.year,
         (pa.year - CAST(p.birth_year AS INTEGER)) AS age
  FROM player_award pa
  JOIN player p ON p.player_id = pa.player_id
  WHERE p.birth_year IS NOT NULL
), max_age AS (
  SELECT award_id, MAX(age) AS max_age
  FROM ages
  GROUP BY award_id
)
SELECT a.award_id, a.player_id, a.name_first, a.name_last, a.year
FROM ages a
JOIN max_age m
  ON m.award_id = a.award_id AND m.max_age = a.age;

WITH rev_by_state AS (

  FROM FINREV_FED_17 f
  JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 k
    ON f.state_code = k.State_Code
  GROUP BY k.State
), min_state AS (
  SELECT state, total_fed_rev
  FROM rev_by_state
  ORDER BY total_fed_rev ASC
  LIMIT 1
), latest_score AS (
  SELECT state, average_scale_score
  FROM NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8
  WHERE all_students = 'All Students'
    AND year = (SELECT MAX(year) FROM NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8)
)

  SELECT state, total_fed_rev, yr
  FROM rev_by_state
  ORDER BY total_fed_rev ASC

)

       AVG(n.average_scale_score) AS state_average_score

    k.State AS state,
    f.school_district,
    f.nces_id,
    f.t_fed_rev,
    f.c14,
    f.c25
  FROM FINREV_FED_17 f
  JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 k
    ON k.State_Code = f.state_code
), top_rev AS (
  SELECT 't_fed_rev' AS category, yr_data, state, school_district, nces_id, t_fed_rev AS amount,
         RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY yr_data ORDER BY t_fed_rev DESC) AS rnk
  FROM rev
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'c14' AS category, yr_data, state, school_district, nces_id, c14 AS amount,
         RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY yr_data ORDER BY c14 DESC) AS rnk
  FROM rev
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'c25' AS category, yr_data, state, school_district, nces_id, c25 AS amount,
         RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY yr_data ORDER BY c25 DESC) AS rnk
  FROM rev
)
SELECT
  t.category,

  t.state,
  t.school_district,
  t.nces_id,

 AND m.year = t.yr_data

WITH rev AS (

    f.yr_data,

  FROM rev

SELECT k.State AS state, COUNT(DISTINCT f.school_district) AS num_school_districts
FROM FINREV_FED_17 f
JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 k ON f.state_code = k.State_Code
WHERE f.yr_data = (SELECT MAX(yr_data) FROM FINREV_FED_17)
GROUP BY k.State
ORDER BY num_school_districts DESC
LIMIT 5;
SELECT T2.state FROM FINREV_FED_17 as T1 JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 as T2 ON T1.state_code = T2.state_code GROUP BY T2.state ORDER BY count(school_district) DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT k.State AS state, SUM(f.t_fed_rev) AS total_revenue
FROM FINREV_FED_17 f
JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 k ON k.State_Code = f.state_code
GROUP BY k.State
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT k.State AS state, SUM(COALESCE(f.t_fed_rev,0)) AS total_revenue
FROM FINREV_FED_17 f
JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 k ON k.State_Code = f.state_code
WHERE f.yr_data = (SELECT MAX(yr_data) FROM FINREV_FED_17)
GROUP BY k.State
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT k.State AS state, AVG(f.t_fed_rev) AS avg_revenue_per_district
FROM FINREV_FED_17 f
JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 k ON k.State_Code = f.state_code
GROUP BY k.State
ORDER BY avg_revenue_per_district DESC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT f.state_code, SUM(f.t_fed_rev) AS total_revenue
FROM FINREV_FED_17 f
GROUP BY f.state_code
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT k.State AS state, SUM(f.c14 + f.c25) AS total_revenue
FROM FINREV_FED_17 f
JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 k ON k.State_Code = f.state_code
GROUP BY k.State
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 5;
SELECT T2.state FROM FINREV_FED_KEY_17 as T2 JOIN FINREV_FED_17 as T1 ON T1.state_code = T2.State_Code GROUP BY T1.state_code ORDER BY sum(t_fed_rev)
